creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Thu Nov 28 17:42:53 2013
New Revision: 335111
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/335111

Log:
  - Add the do-configure target
  
  PR:		ports/184333
  Submitted by:	Fernando <fernando.apesteguia@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/lang/basic256/Makefile

Modified: head/lang/basic256/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/basic256/Makefile	Thu Nov 28 17:23:15 2013	(r335110)
+++ head/lang/basic256/Makefile	Thu Nov 28 17:42:53 2013	(r335111)
@@ -24,6 +24,10 @@ USE_QT4=	corelib gui network xml webkit 
 
 MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=	yes
 
+do-configure:
+	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${SETENV} ${CONFIGURE_ENV} \
+		${QMAKE} "PREFIX=${PREFIX}" BASIC256.pro
+
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's/mutex/mymutex/' ${WRKSRC}/*.cpp
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|%%LOCALBASE%%|${LOCALBASE}|' ${WRKSRC}/BASIC256.pro
